prompt_text:
### Demographics: 74-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 11 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Mild dyspepsia and bloating

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class II)
ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Female Breast Cancer (Endocrine Therapy)
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Thyroid nodule (status post lobectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD: Peripheral artery disease; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 5 years ago; 20 cigarettes/day for 15 years; ~15 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Liraglutide 1.8mg once daily; Dapagliflozin 10mg once daily; Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily), Letrozole (2.5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 76.7 kg; Height 156.6 cm; BMI 31.4 kg/m²; Blood pressure 132/90 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.1%; 6 months ago 6.6%; 3 months ago 6.1%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 184mg/dL; 9 months ago 161mg/dL; 6 months ago 152mg/dL; 3 months ago 133mg/dL; current 137mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 78.2kg; 9 months ago 76.9kg; 6 months ago 76.8kg; 3 months ago 76.2kg; current 76.7kg), Height (12 months ago 156.6cm; 9 months ago 156.6cm; 6 months ago 156.6cm; 3 months ago 156.6cm; current 156.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 31.0kg/m²; current 31.4kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 133mmHg; 9 months ago 133mmHg; 6 months ago 138mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 132mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 89mmHg; 9 months ago 90mmHg; 6 months ago 90mmHg; 3 months ago 87mmHg; current 90mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 34U/L; 9 months ago 35U/L; 6 months ago 33U/L; 3 months ago 25U/L; current 30U/L), AST (12 months ago 20U/L; 9 months ago 20U/L; 6 months ago 11U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 16U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 1.0mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 26mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 232mg/g; 9 months ago 231mg/g; 6 months ago 216mg/g; 3 months ago 211mg/g; current 203mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 77mg/dL; 9 months ago 83mg/dL; 6 months ago 81mg/dL; 3 months ago 76mg/dL; current 80mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 58mg/dL; 9 months ago 61mg/dL; 6 months ago 60mg/dL; 3 months ago 57mg/dL; current 59mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 141mg/dL; 9 months ago 159mg/dL; 6 months ago 142mg/dL; 3 months ago 146mg/dL; current 153mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.0g/dL; current 11.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
